mechanism_narrative: A multi-month decline in FEDFUNDS reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and signals policy accommodation, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as risk premia compress.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS 3-month change and forward 20d SPX return stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year walk-forward window, or returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.5 percentage points over three months, it signals accelerating labor market deterioration that precedes earnings downgrades, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns following triggered UNRATE spikes are positive in more than 55% of historical instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: A joint collapse in HOUST alongside aggressive FEDFUNDS cuts indicates the housing channel of monetary transmission is broken, delaying the recovery of interest-sensitive demand and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days despite policy easing.
candidate_trigger: HOUST below 1000k units while FEDFUNDS falls > 1pp over 6 months
regime_hint: balance sheet recession / broken monetary transmission
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns are positive in a majority of instances when both HOUST is depressed and FEDFUNDS is falling, or the joint interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over either series alone (interaction Rank IC < single-series Rank IC).

mechanism_narrative: During a recognized economic contraction regime, continued month-over-month declines in INDPRO reflect ongoing deleveraging in the industrial sector, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings estimates continue to be revised downward.
failure_condition: During periods with negative trailing GDPC1 growth, SPX 60d forward returns following INDPRO declines are positive in more than 55% of cases, invalidating the negative directional claim.

mechanism_narrative: A short-term uptick in RSAFS (retail sales) signals resilient consumer demand not yet priced by equity markets, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as sentiment adjusts.
failure_condition: 5-day forward SPX returns show no statistically significant relationship (p > 0.10) to month-over-month RSAFS changes across a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO month-over-month growth crosses from negative to positive after a sustained contraction, it signals an inflection in the industrial cycle that precedes a broad equity market recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO MoM change turns positive after 3+ consecutive months of decline
failure_condition: SPX 20d forward returns following the INDPRO inflection signal are negative or statistically indistinguishable from baseline (p > 0.05) in a majority of historical trough episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in PAYEMS job losses and a rising UNRATE indicates a compounding labor market shock (both stock and flow deterioration), which amplifies negative earnings revisions and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days beyond what either series predicts alone.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month decline exceeds 500k jobs while UNRATE rises > 0.5pp concurrently
failure_condition: The joint PAYEMS-UNRATE interaction signal shows Rank IC no better than the best single-series labor proxy over rolling 2-year walk-forward windows, or SPX 60d returns are not significantly more negative than baseline during triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL shows month-over-month declines (deflationary pressure) while FEDFUNDS remains elevated relative to prior easing pace, real interest rates rise unexpectedly, tightening financial conditions and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL MoM change < 0 for 2+ consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX 5d forward returns following consecutive CPIAUCSL declines are positive or flat (not significantly negative, p > 0.10) across the majority of observed deflationary episodes.
